description: Published to rules.changed on every successful rule mutation. Enables the filter-service to invalidate its rule cache without polling.

fields.name: rule
fields.description: Full snapshot of the rule at the time of the event. Not a diff.

invariants: A RuleChangedEvent is published for every successful POST /rules and DELETE /rules/{id}.
The rule field contains the full rule snapshot, not a diff.
Consumers must be idempotent — the bus delivers at least once.
